LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WESTFIELD, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. THERE IS NO DISPUTE AS TO THE OBLIGATION TO ARBITRATE. THE ISSUE OF FEES WAS NOT ADDRESSED AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE MATTER (ONLY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL APPEARED AT THE HEARING). PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WESTFIELD, LLC'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration.
APPEARANCES: Jeffrey R. Cluett, Esq. of Quadros & Johnson, LLP 650/377-4300 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. There is no dispute as to the obligation to arbitrate. The issue of fees was not addressed at the conclusion of the matter (only plaintiff's counsel appeared at the hearing). Plaintiff will prepare proposed form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
